title: Give me a list of names for an application to be developed that would allow home builders to communicate with home owner…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Give me a list of names for an application to be developed that would allow home builders to communicate with home owners concerning warranty claims.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
1. HomeWise
2. WarrantyWorks
3. ClaimConnect
4. BuildAssure
5. HomeFixer
6. HouseLink
7. WarrantyWay
8. ConstructConnect
9. HomeGuard
10. SupportHome
11. HomeCareX
12. RelationBuilder
13. MyFixmate
14. HomeClaimsX

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
Sure, here are 10 more examples of names for an application to allow home builders to communicate with home owners regarding warranty claims:

1. ClaimKeeper
2. BuildAssist
3. HomeWarrantyPro
4. FixFinder
5. WarrantyTracker
6. HomeSupportX
7. BuilderBond
8. HomeIssueSolver
9. ClaimBridge
10. BuildGuardian
